h1.visual_description: Large, bold, black sans-serif font; serves as the primary slide message/title.
h1.example_text: Recommendation pack shows outstanding performance of 1.7~2.6 times that of competing models even when using commercial service data

h2.visual_description: Medium-sized, purple sans-serif font; located at the top left as a section or breadcrumb header.

h3.visual_description: Small, bold, black sans-serif font; used for individual chart or column titles.
h3.example_text: Comparison with Beauty Commerce Recommendation Models

h4.visual_description: Small, regular weight, grey sans-serif font; used for sub-captions or descriptive text under chart titles.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Represents the performance metrics and results of the UpStage proprietary solution.
Represents competitor models, industry baselines, or existing service algorithms.

visual_matchers.pattern: Blue dashed lines with upward arrows and multipliers (e.g., 1.7X↑, 20%↑)
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Indicates the relative performance lift or improvement factor of UpStage over the baseline.

markdown_grammar.math_environment: inline LaTeX for symbols and ranges (e.g., $1.7\sim2.6$, $20\%\uparrow$)

layout_info.primary_flow: multi-column (3-column grid layout for data visualizations)
layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page number located in the bottom right corner; decorative vertical purple line in the top left margin.
